sentence: 他家新装了一条宽带网络。
pinyin: Tā jiā xīn zhuāng le yī tiáo kuāndài wǎngluò.
english: His family just got a new broadband internet connection.

meaning: 1. also written 機槍|机枪; 2. machine gun
sentence: 士兵架起机关枪守住了阵地。
pinyin: Shìbīng jiàqǐ jīguānqiāng shǒuzhù le zhèndì.
english: The soldiers set up a machine gun to hold their position.

sentence: 保守派反对这项新政策。
pinyin: Bǎoshǒupài fǎnduì zhè xiàng xīn zhèngcè.
english: The conservative faction opposed this new policy.

sentence: 他是公司里的中层管理人员。
pinyin: Tā shì gōngsī lǐ de zhōngcéng guǎnlǐ rényuán.
english: He is middle management at the company.

meaning: 1. to do as one sees fit; 2. to play it by ear (according to the circu
sentence: 这件事你自己看着办吧。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì nǐ zìjǐ kànzheàn bā.
english: Handle this matter however you see fit.
